# PHIL.032 ? Neo-Confucianism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** neo_confucianism
**Domain:** EASTERN_PHILOSOPHY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Li (principle) and qi (vital energy); investigation of things; moral cultivation; synthesis of Confucianism with Buddhist/Taoist elements

## Application
Investigate underlying principles; cultivate moral nature; integrate contemplation with action; seek harmony of principle and energy

## Key Values
- Principle investigation
- Moral cultivation
- Integrated understanding
- Systematic learning

## Tags
philosophy, eastern-philosophy, neo-confucianism
